Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
 Preservation of morphisms by pullbacks

 Contents:
 1. Pullbacks of faithful 1-cells
 2. Pullbacks of fully faithful 1-cells
 3. Pullbacks of conservative 1-cells
 4. Pullbacks of discrete 1-cells
 5. Pullbacks of pseudomonic 1-cells
 6. Pullbacks of Street fibrations
 7. Pullbacks of Street opfibrations
 *)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.OpCellBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.DiscreteMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.InternalStreetOpFibration.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Pullbacks.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Examples.OpCellBicatLimits.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. Pullbacks of faithful 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂


B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α = β

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)
 • ((α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb) ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
  • ((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)
 • ((α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb) ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
  • ((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
• (lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
   • (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb) ▹ g)
      • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)) =
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
• (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
      • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)))

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
• (lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
   • (rassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
      • (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g))) =
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
• (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
      • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)))

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g

Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
• (lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
   • (rassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
      • (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g))) = ?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
?b =
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
• (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
      • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)))

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
• (lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
   • (rassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
      • (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

Hf: faithful_1cell f

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
• (rassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
   • (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g
 • rassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)
• (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
id₂ (h₁ · (pb_cone_pr2 pb · g))
• (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g) = ?t2

      apply id2_left.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb) • (α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb · g) =
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
• (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
      • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)))

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B

g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g

Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb · f) • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb) =
lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
• (((α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f
      • (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)))

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

Hf: faithful_1cell f

p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb · f =
(α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb · f)
• id₂ (h₂ · (pb_cone_pr1 pb · f))

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb · f = α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb · f

    apply idpath.
  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb
 apply idpath.
  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb
 apply idpath.
  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ p₁ = α ▹ p₁

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(β ▹ p₁) ▹ f = (α ▹ p₁) ▹ f

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
lassociator h₁ p₁ f • ((β ▹ p₁) ▹ f) =
lassociator h₁ p₁ f • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(β ▹ p₁ · f) • lassociator h₂ p₁ f =
(α ▹ p₁ · f) • lassociator h₂ p₁ f

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ p₁ · f = α ▹ p₁ · f

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(β ▹ p₁ · f) • (h₂ ◃ γ) = (α ▹ p₁ · f) • (h₂ ◃ γ)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(h₁ ◃ γ) • (β ▹ p₂ · g) = (h₁ ◃ γ) • (α ▹ p₂ · g)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ p₂ · g = α ▹ p₂ · g

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
(β ▹ p₂ · g) • lassociator h₂ p₂ g =
(α ▹ p₂ · g) • lassociator h₂ p₂ g

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
lassociator h₁ p₂ g • ((β ▹ p₂) ▹ g) =
lassociator h₁ p₂ g • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ p₂ = α ▹ p₂

    exact (!p).
  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α, β: h₁ ==> h₂
p: α ▹ p₂ = β ▹ p₂
β ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb
 exact (!p).
Qed.

(**
 2. Pullbacks of fully faithful 1-cells
 *)
Section PbOfFullyFaithful.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : B}
          {p₁ : x₁ --> y₁}
          {p₂ : x₁ --> x₂}
          {f : y₁ --> y₂}
          {g : x₂ --> y₂}
          {γ : invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)}
          (pb := make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ)
          (H : has_pb_ump pb)
          (Hf : fully_faithful_1cell f).

  Section Fullness.
    Context {z : B}
            {h₁ h₂ : z --> x₁}
            (αf : h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂).

    Let ψ : h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
      := rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ γ)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (αf ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ γ^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _.

    Let ζ : h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
      := fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • (ζ ▹ f)) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • (ζ ▹ f)) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f
  • (fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ p₁ f) • (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • ψ) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f
  • ((((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
         • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
       • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator h₂ p₁ f)) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((((((((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • rassociator h₁ p₁ f)
       • (h₁ ◃ γ)) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator h₂ p₁ f) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
(((((((id₂ (h₁ · (p₁ · f)) • (h₁ ◃ γ))
      • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator h₂ p₁ f) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
(((((((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator h₂ p₁ f) • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)
• (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(h₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h₁ p₂ g
   • ((αf ▹ g) • rassociator h₂ p₂ g)) =
(h₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h₁ p₂ g
   • ((αf ▹ g)
      • (rassociator h₂ p₂ g
         • ((h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • (lassociator h₂ p₁ f
               • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ)))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
rassociator h₂ p₂ g
• ((h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
   • (lassociator h₂ p₁ f
      • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
rassociator h₂ p₂ g • id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g)) =
rassociator h₂ p₂ g
• ((h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
   • (lassociator h₂ p₁ f
      • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ))))

• (lassociator h₂ p₁ f
   • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ)))

?b = id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g))

    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f

lassociator h₂ p₁ f • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ)) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f

ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(lassociator h₂ p₁ f • rassociator h₂ p₁ f) • (h₂ ◃ γ) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
id₂ (h₂ · (p₁ · f)) • (h₂ ◃ γ) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(h₂ ◃ γ ^-1) • (h₂ ◃ γ) = id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₂ ◃ (γ ^-1 • γ) = id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₂ ◃ id₂ (p₂ · g) = id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g)) = id₂ (h₂ · (p₂ · g))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₁ ==> h₂

ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₁ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> h₂ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (?α ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₁ · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> h₂ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
 exact ζ.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • (ζ ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 exact pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell_help_eq.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell ▹ p₂ = αf

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell ▹ p₂ = αf

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
ψ:= (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f: h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
ζ:= fully_faithful_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ: h₁ · p₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ ζ αf
  pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell_help_eq ▹ p₂ = αf

      apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H).
    Qed.
  End Fullness.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
fully_faithful_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
fully_faithful_1cell p₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂),
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ p₂ = αf

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
 exact (pb_of_faithful_1cell H (pr1 Hf)).
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂),
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, α ▹ p₂ = αf
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: fully_faithful_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: h₁ · p₂ ==> h₂ · p₂
∑ α : h₁ ==> h₂, α ▹ p₂ = αf

      exact (pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell αf
             ,,
             pb_of_fully_faithful_1cell_2cell_eq αf).
  Defined.
End PbOfFullyFaithful.

(**
 3. Pullbacks of conservative 1-cells
 *)
Section PbOfConservative.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : B}
          {p₁ : x₁ --> y₁}
          {p₂ : x₁ --> x₂}
          {f : y₁ --> y₂}
          {g : x₂ --> y₂}
          {γ : invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)}
          (pb := make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ)
          (H : has_pb_ump pb)
          (Hf : conservative_1cell f).

  Section ReflectIso.
    Context {z : B}
            {h₁ h₂ : z --> x₁}
            {α : h₁ ==> h₂}
            (Hα : is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)).

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₁)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₁)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
?α = (α ▹ p₁) ▹ f
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell ?α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
h₁ · p₁ · f ==> h₂ · p₁ · f
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
               • (_ ◃ γ)
               • lassociator _ _ _
               • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g)
               • rassociator _ _ _
               • (_ ◃ γ^-1)
               • lassociator _ _ _).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
(((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
  • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator h₂ p₁ f = (α ▹ p₁) ▹ f
 abstract
          (rewrite !vassocl ;
           use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           apply id2_right).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
       • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
     • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
   • lassociator h₂ p₁ f)
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
      • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
    • rassociator h₂ p₂ g) • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1))

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
     • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
   • rassociator h₂ p₂ g)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
   • lassociator h₁ p₂ g)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g)

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((rassociator h₁ p₁ f • (h₁ ◃ γ))
   • lassociator h₁ p₂ g)

is_invertible_2cell γ

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell .

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ p₁ f) • (h₂ ◃ γ)

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
(((h₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator h₁ p₂ g) • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g))
• rassociator h₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator h₁ p₁ f • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ p₁ f) • (h₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B

f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

(h₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h₁ p₂ g
   • (((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g) • rassociator h₂ p₂ g)) =
lassociator h₁ p₁ f
• (((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f) • (rassociator h₂ p₁ f • (h₂ ◃ γ)))

(h₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h₁ p₂ g

(α ▹ p₁ · f)
• (lassociator h₂ p₁ f • rassociator h₂ p₁ f)

z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧

Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ p₁ · f = (α ▹ p₁ · f) • id₂ (h₂ · (p₁ · f))

z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ p₁ · f = α ▹ p₁ · f

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧

h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ (α ▹ p₁) (α ▹ p₂)
  pb_reflect_iso_eq = α

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)
 • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ (α ▹ p₁) (α ▹ p₂)
  pb_reflect_iso_eq ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ p₁
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ (α ▹ p₁) (α ▹ p₂)
  pb_reflect_iso_eq ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ p₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ p₁
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ p₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
(((h₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g)
 • ((α ▹ p₂) ▹ g)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) g =
((lassociator h₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ f))
 • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) f)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 apply pb_reflect_iso_eq.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ (α ▹ p₁) (α ▹ p₂)
  pb_reflect_iso_eq ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ p₁
 apply pb_ump_cell_pr1.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
pb_ump_cell H h₁ h₂ (α ▹ p₁) (α ▹ p₂)
  pb_reflect_iso_eq ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ p₂
 apply pb_ump_cell_pr2.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = α ▹ p₁
 apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
α ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = α ▹ p₂
 apply idpath.
    Defined.
  End ReflectIso.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
conservative_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
conservative_1cell p₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: conservative_1cell f
z: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂
Hα: is_invertible_2cell (α ▹ p₂)
is_invertible_2cell α

    exact (pb_reflect_iso Hα).
  Defined.
End PbOfConservative.

(**
 4. Pullbacks of discrete 1-cells
 *)

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
discrete_1cell p₂


B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
discrete_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
conservative_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
 exact (pb_of_faithful_1cell H (pr1 Hf)).
  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: discrete_1cell f
conservative_1cell p₂
 exact (pb_of_conservative_1cell H (pr2 Hf)).
Defined.

(**
 5. Pullbacks of pseudomonic 1-cells
 *)
Section PullbackOfPseudomonic.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : B}
          {p₁ : x₁ --> y₁}
          {p₂ : x₁ --> x₂}
          {f : y₁ --> y₂}
          {g : x₂ --> y₂}
          {γ : invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)}
          (pb := make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ)
          (H : has_pb_ump pb)
          (Hf : pseudomonic_1cell f).

  Section Invmap.
    Context {z : B}
            {g₁ g₂ : z --> x₁}
            (αf : g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂)
            (Hαf : is_invertible_2cell αf).

    Local Definition pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_help_cell
      : g₁ · p₁ · f ==> g₂ · p₁ · f
      := rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ γ)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (αf ▹ _)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (_ ◃ γ^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _.

    Local Notation "'ψ'" := pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_help_cell.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell ψ

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell ψ

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((((rassociator g₁ p₁ f • (g₁ ◃ γ))
       • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
     • rassociator g₂ p₂ g) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
   • lassociator g₂ p₁ f)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell γ

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    Qed.

    Local Notation "'Hψ'" := pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_help_cell_invertible.

    Let ζ : g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
      := pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • (ζ ▹ f)) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • (ζ ▹ f)) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f
  • (pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ ▹ f))
 • rassociator g₂ p₁ f) • (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • ψ) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f
  • ((((((rassociator g₁ p₁ f • (g₁ ◃ γ))
         • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
       • rassociator g₂ p₂ g) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
     • lassociator g₂ p₁ f)) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((((((((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • rassociator g₁ p₁ f)
       • (g₁ ◃ γ)) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator g₂ p₂ g) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator g₂ p₁ f) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
(((((((id₂ (g₁ · (p₁ · f)) • (g₁ ◃ γ))
      • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator g₂ p₂ g) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator g₂ p₁ f) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
(((((((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
    • rassociator g₂ p₂ g) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))
  • lassociator g₂ p₁ f) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(g₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator g₁ p₂ g
   • ((αf ▹ g) • rassociator g₂ p₂ g)) =
(g₁ ◃ γ)
• (lassociator g₁ p₂ g
   • ((αf ▹ g)
      • (rassociator g₂ p₂ g
         • ((g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • (lassociator g₂ p₁ f
               • (rassociator g₂ p₁ f • (g₂ ◃ γ)))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
rassociator g₂ p₂ g
• ((g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
   • (lassociator g₂ p₁ f
      • (rassociator g₂ p₁ f • (g₂ ◃ γ))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
rassociator g₂ p₂ g • id₂ (g₂ · (p₂ · g)) =
rassociator g₂ p₂ g
• ((g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
   • (lassociator g₂ p₁ f
      • (rassociator g₂ p₁ f • (g₂ ◃ γ))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)

z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
id₂ (g₂ · (p₂ · g)) =
(g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)
• (lassociator g₂ p₁ f
   • (rassociator g₂ p₁ f • (g₂ ◃ γ)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
(g₂ ◃ γ) • id₂ (g₂ · (p₂ · g)) =
lassociator g₂ p₁ f • (rassociator g₂ p₁ f • (g₂ ◃ γ))

g₂ ◃ γ =

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B

(lassociator g₂ p₁ f • rassociator g₂ p₁ f) • (g₂ ◃ γ)

g₂ ◃ γ = id₂ (g₂ · (p₁ · f)) • (g₂ ◃ γ)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧

g₂ ◃ γ = g₂ ◃ γ

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g

Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧

Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf

(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • (?Goal ▹ f))
 • rassociator g₂ p₁ f) • (g₂ ◃ γ)

Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf

g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
 exact ζ.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)

(((g₁ ◃ γ) • lassociator g₁ p₂ g) • (αf ▹ g))
• rassociator g₂ p₂ g =
((lassociator g₁ p₁ f • (ζ ▹ f)) • rassociator g₂ p₁ f)
• (g₂ ◃ γ)
 exact pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_eq_help.
    Defined.

 exact Hαf.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap ▹ p₂ = αf

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)

H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
ζ:= pseudomonic_1cell_inv_map Hf ψ Hψ: g₁ · p₁ ==> g₂ · p₁
pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap ▹ p₂ = αf

      apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H).
    Qed.
  End Invmap.

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
pseudomonic_1cell p₂

  
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
pseudomonic_1cell p₂

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂),
is_invertible_2cell αf
→ ∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ p₂ = αf

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
faithful_1cell p₂
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
faithful_1cell f

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
pseudomonic_1cell f

      exact Hf.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
∏ (z : B) (g₁ g₂ : B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧)
(αf : g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂),
is_invertible_2cell αf
→ ∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ p₂ = αf
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
∑ α : g₁ ==> g₂, is_invertible_2cell α × α ▹ p₂ = αf

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
g₁ ==> g₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell ?pr1
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell ?pr1, ?pr1 ▹ p₂ = αf) ?pr10

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
g₁ ==> g₂
 exact (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap αf Hαf).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap αf Hαf)
 exact (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_is_invertible αf Hαf).
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
f: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
g: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (p₁ · f) (p₂ · g)
pb:= make_pb_cone x₁ p₁ p₂ γ: pb_cone f g
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: pseudomonic_1cell f
z: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ z, x₁ ⟧
αf: g₁ · p₂ ==> g₂ · p₂
Hαf: is_invertible_2cell αf
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap αf Hαf),
 pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap αf Hαf ▹ p₂ = αf)
  (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_is_invertible αf Hαf)
 exact (pb_of_pseudomonic_1cell_invmap_eq αf Hαf).
  Defined.
End PullbackOfPseudomonic.

(**
 6. Pullbacks of Street fibrations
 *)
Section PullbackOfSFib.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {e₁ e₂ b₁ b₂ : B}
          {p₁ : e₁ --> b₁}
          {p₂ : e₂ --> b₂}
          {fe : e₁ --> e₂}
          {fb : b₁ --> b₂}
          {γ : invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)}
          (pb := make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ)
          (H : has_pb_ump pb)
          (Hf : internal_sfib p₂).

  Section ToPBCartesian.
    Context {x : B}
            {g₁ g₂ : x --> e₁}
            (α : g₁ ==> g₂)
            (Hα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe))
            {h : x --> e₁}
            {β : h ==> g₂}
            {δp : h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁}
            (q : β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)).

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
isaprop (∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
isaprop (∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
φ₁ = φ₂

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : h ==> g₁, x0 ▹ p₁ = δp × x0 • α = β)
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : h ==> g₁, x0 ▹ p₁ = δp × x0 • α = β)

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
x0: h ==> g₁
isaprop (x0 ▹ p₁ = δp × x0 • α = β)

        apply isapropdirprod ; apply cellset_property.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
h · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> g₁ · pb_cone_pr1 pb

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
h · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> g₁ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

α: g₁ ==> g₂

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(((h ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb) • (?β ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb =
((lassociator h (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂ • (?α ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂)
• (g₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = ?α

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = ?β

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
h · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> g₁ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
 exact (pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe).

α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

h · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> g₁ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
 exact δp.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(((h ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb =
((lassociator h (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂
  • ((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₁ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂)
• (g₁ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb =
((lassociator h fe p₂ • ((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₁ fe p₂) • (g₁ ◃ γ)

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb)) =
lassociator h fe p₂
• (((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
   • (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ)))

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
lassociator h fe p₂
• (((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
   • (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ))) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb))

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
lassociator h fe p₂
• (((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
   • (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ))) = ?b
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
?b =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb))

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
lassociator h fe p₂
• (((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
   • (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
• (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ)) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(((pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂) • rassociator g₁ fe p₂)
• (g₁ ◃ γ) = ?t2

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(rassociator h fe p₂ • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂)) • (g₁ ◃ γ) =
?t2

          apply idpath.
        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
lassociator h fe p₂
• ((rassociator h fe p₂ • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂))
   • (g₁ ◃ γ)) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb))

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
((lassociator h fe p₂ • rassociator h fe p₂)
 • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂)) • (g₁ ◃ γ) =
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(id₂ (h · (fe · p₂)) • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂)) • (g₁ ◃ γ) =
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂) • (g₁ ◃ γ) =
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(h ◃ γ) • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ p₁ · fb) =
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

(h ◃ γ) • (pr1 φ₁ ▹ p₁ · fb) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb))

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

δp ▹ fb = δp ▹ fb

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe
 apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = δp
 exact (pr12 φ₁).

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe
