g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
                 • (h ◃ γ)
                 • lassociator _ _ _
                 • (δp ▹ _)
                 • rassociator _ _ _
                 • (g₁ ◃ γ^-1)
                 • lassociator _ _ _).
        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
((((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
     • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
   • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator g₁ fe p₂) • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)

(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
rassociator h fe p₂
• ((h ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator h p₁ fb
      • ((δp ▹ fb)
         • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
            • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
               • (lassociator g₁ fe p₂
                  • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)))))))

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

(β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb = (δp ▹ fb) • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb)

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb = (δp • (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fb

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(δp • (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fb = (δp • (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fb

          apply idpath.
        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
(((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
rassociator h fe p₂
• ((h ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator h p₁ fb
      • ((δp ▹ fb)
         • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
            • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1) • lassociator g₁ fe p₂)))))

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

lassociator h fe p₂ • ((pr1 φ₂ ▹ fe) ▹ p₂) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1) • lassociator g₁ fe p₂))))

β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₁ fe p₂ =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1) • lassociator g₁ fe p₂))))

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₁ fe p₂ =
(((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂

pr1 φ₁ ▹ fe · p₂ =

 • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)

• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

((pr1 φ₁ ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb =
(δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₁ ▹ p₁) ▹ fb = δp ▹ fb

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₁ ▹ p₁ = δp

          exact (pr12 φ₁).
        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ ▹ fe) • (α ▹ fe) = β ▹ fe
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
(pr1 φ₂ • α) ▹ fe = β ▹ fe

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
β ▹ fe = β ▹ fe

          apply idpath.

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

(pr1 φ₁ • α) ▹ fe = β ▹ fe

          
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
β ▹ fe = β ▹ fe

          apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ₁, φ₂: ∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
pr1 φ₂ ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = δp
 exact (pr12 φ₂).
    Qed.

    Let φ : h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
      := rassociator _ _ _
         • (h ◃ γ)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (δp ▹ fb)
         • rassociator _ _ _
         • (g₁ ◃ γ^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ = φ • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ = φ • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
((((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
     • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
   • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
 • lassociator g₁ fe p₂) • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
rassociator h fe p₂
• ((h ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator h p₁ fb
      • ((δp ▹ fb)
         • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
            • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
               • (lassociator g₁ fe p₂
                  • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)))))))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂ =
rassociator h fe p₂
• ((h ◃ γ)
   • (lassociator h p₁ fb
      • ((δp ▹ fb)
         • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
            • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
               • ((α ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂))))))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator h fe p₂) ^-1
• ((β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • ((α ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂)))))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
lassociator h fe p₂ • ((β ▹ fe) ▹ p₂) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • ((α ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂)))))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂ =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • ((α ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂)))))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe · p₂) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂ =
((((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
   • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
 • (α ▹ fe · p₂)) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂

δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁

β ▹ fe · p₂ =
(((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• (α ▹ fe · p₂)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)

H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

(((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (α ▹ p₁ · fb))
• (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe · p₂)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker g₂
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv γ)) ^-1 =
((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
 • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (α ▹ p₁ · fb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ fe · p₂) • (g₂ ◃ γ) =
((((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
 • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (α ▹ p₁ · fb)

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

• ((δp ▹ fb)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator h p₁ fb) ^-1
• (β ▹ p₁ · fb) =
(δp ▹ fb) • (((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
rassociator h p₁ fb • (β ▹ p₁ · fb) =
(δp ▹ fb) • (((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
((β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb =
(δp ▹ fb) • (((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
((β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb =
((δp ▹ fb) • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb)) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb = (δp ▹ fb) • ((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb = (δp • (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fb

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

      exact q.
    Qed.

    Let to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1
      : h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
      := is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor _ Hα _ _ φ_eq.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(((h ◃ γ) • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₁ p₁ fb =
((lassociator h fe p₂
  • (to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₁ fe p₂) • (g₁ ◃ γ)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb) • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb)) =
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)
            • (lassociator g₁ fe p₂
               • (rassociator g₁ fe p₂ • (g₁ ◃ γ)))))))

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))

to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
rassociator g₁ p₁ fb =
rassociator g₁ p₁ fb • (g₁ ◃ id₂ (p₁ · fb))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
rassociator g₁ p₁ fb =
rassociator g₁ p₁ fb • id₂ (g₁ · (p₁ · fb))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
rassociator g₁ p₁ fb = rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

pb_cone_pr1 pb = 
?α
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • 
   (δp ▹ fb)) • 
  rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • 
 (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)) • 
lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(pb_ump_cell H h g₁ to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 δp
   to_pb_cartesian_cell_eq • α) ▹ 
pb_cone_pr2 pb = 
?β
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • 
   (δp ▹ fb)) • 
  rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • 
 (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)) • 
lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
β ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb = ?α

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂

q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)

    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • 
   (δp ▹ fb)) • 
  rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • 
 (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)) • 
lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
β ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = ?β

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
h · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==> g₂ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
 exact (to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 • (α ▹ fe)).

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
h · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==> g₂ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
 exact (δp • (α ▹ p₁)).
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(((h ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator h (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb)
 • ((δp • (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fb))
• rassociator g₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb =
((lassociator h (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂
  • ((to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 • (α ▹ fe)) ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂)
• (g₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂

  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • (((β ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)) =
lassociator h fe p₂
• ((is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ
      φ_eq ▹ p₂)
   • (((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)
      • (rassociator g₂ fe p₂ • (g₂ ◃ γ))))

  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(β ▹ fe · p₂) • (g₂ ◃ γ) =
lassociator h fe p₂
• (((φ • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂)) • rassociator g₂ fe p₂)
   • (g₂ ◃ γ))

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(β ▹ fe · p₂) • (g₂ ◃ γ) =
(((lassociator h fe p₂ • φ) • ((α ▹ fe) ▹ p₂))
 • rassociator g₂ fe p₂) • (g₂ ◃ γ)

φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((g₁ ◃ γ ^-1) • (α ▹ fe · p₂))))) =
β ▹ fe · p₂

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(h ◃ γ)
• (lassociator h p₁ fb
   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb
         • ((α ▹ p₁ · fb) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1))))) =
β ▹ fe · p₂

   • ((δp ▹ fb)
      • (rassociator g₁ p₁ fb

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

   (δp ▹ fb)) • 
  rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • 
 (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1)) • 
lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
?b = β ▹ fe · p₂

?t2

(((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)
• (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1) = ?t2

fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(rassociator h p₁ fb • (β ▹ p₁ · fb)) • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1) =
?t2

  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)

    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂

  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
id₂ (h · (fe · p₂)) • (β ▹ fe · p₂) = β ▹ fe · p₂

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(pb_ump_cell H h g₁ to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 δp
   to_pb_cartesian_cell_eq • α) ▹ pb_cone_pr1 pb =
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1 • (α ▹ fe)

    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))

  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
(pb_ump_cell H h g₁
   (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ

• (α ▹ fe)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq
• (α ▹ fe) = β ▹ fe

        apply is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor_comm.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
φ:= (((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
    • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
  • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
• lassociator g₁ fe p₂: h · fe · p₂ ==> g₁ · fe · p₂
to_pb_cartesian_cell_on_pr1:= is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor
  p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe) φ φ_eq: h · fe ==> g₁ · fe
β ▹ pb_cone_pr2 pb = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
 exact q.
    Qed.
  End ToPBCartesian.

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
∃! δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
isaprop (∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β)

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β

β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
isaprop (∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β)
 exact (to_pb_cartesian_unique α Hα q).
    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
∑ δ : h ==> g₁, δ ▹ p₁ = δp × δ • α = β
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
h ==> g₁
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
?pr1 ▹ p₁ = δp
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(λ _ : ?pr1 ▹ p₁ = δp, ?pr1 • α = β) ?pr10

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
h ==> g₁
 exact (to_pb_cartesian_cell α Hα q).
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
to_pb_cartesian_cell α Hα q ▹ p₁ = δp
 apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H).
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)
h: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β: h ==> g₂
δp: h · p₁ ==> g₁ · p₁
q: β ▹ p₁ = δp • (α ▹ p₁)
(λ _ : to_pb_cartesian_cell α Hα q ▹ p₁ = δp,
 to_pb_cartesian_cell α Hα q • α = β)
  (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H h g₁
     (is_cartesian_2cell_sfib_factor p₂ Hα (β ▹ fe)
        ((((((rassociator h fe p₂ • (h ◃ γ))
             • lassociator h p₁ fb) • (δp ▹ fb))
           • rassociator g₁ p₁ fb) • (g₁ ◃ γ ^-1))
         • lassociator g₁ fe p₂) (φ_eq α q)) δp
     (to_pb_cartesian_cell_eq α Hα q))
 exact (to_pb_cartesian_comm α Hα q).
  Defined.

  Section Cleaving.
    Context {x : B}
            {h₁ : x --> b₁}
            {h₂ : x --> e₁}
            (α : h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁).

B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B

h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
h₁ · fb ==> h₂ · fe · p₂
 exact ((α ▹ _)
                 • rassociator _ _ _
                 • (h₂ ◃ γ^-1)
                 • lassociator _ _ _).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_cone p₂ fb

 exact x.

B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧

  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
 exact h₁.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
invertible_2cell (x_to_e₂ · p₂) (h₁ · fb)
 apply internal_sfib_cleaving_com.
    Defined.

    Definition pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor
      : x --> e₁
      := pb_ump_mor H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor ==> h₂

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor ==> h₂

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==>
h₂ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==>
h₂ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
(((pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor
      (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb) • 
 (?β ▹ fb)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb =
((lassociator pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor 
    (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂ • 
  (?α ▹ p₂)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor · pb_cone_pr1 pb ==>
h₂ · pb_cone_pr1 pb
 exact (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone
                              •
                              internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell _ _ _).
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor · pb_cone_pr2 pb ==>
h₂ · pb_cone_pr2 pb
 exact (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone • α).
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
(((pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
  • lassociator pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor
      (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb)
 • ((pb_ump_mor_pr2 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone • α)
    ▹ fb)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr2 pb) fb =
((lassociator pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
    p₂
  • ((pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone
      • internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
          ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
            • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂))
     ▹ p₂)) • rassociator h₂ (pb_cone_pr1 pb) p₂)
• (h₂ ◃ pb_cone_cell pb)
 abstract
          (simpl ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             exact (pb_ump_mor_cell H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone)
           | ] ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite vcomp_linv ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             apply idpath
           | ] ;
           refine (!_) ;
           etrans ;
           [ apply maponpaths_2 ;
             apply internal_sfib_cleaving_over
           | ] ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite vcomp_linv ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           apply id2_right).
    Defined.

    Definition pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over
      : invertible_2cell (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor · p₁) h₁
      := pb_ump_mor_pr2 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ p₁ =
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over • α

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ p₁ =
pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over • α

      apply (pb_ump_cell_pr2 H).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell ▹ fe)

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone
   • internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
       ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
         • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone)
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
     ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
       • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • 
      lassociator h₂ fe p₂))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone)
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone)

        apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
h₁: B ⟦ x, b₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: h₁ ==> h₂ · p₁
x_to_e₂:= internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_mor p₂ Hf
  ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
    • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂): B ⟦ x, e₂ ⟧
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
     ((((α ▹ fb) • rassociator h₂ p₁ fb)
       • (h₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator h₂ fe p₂))
 apply internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian.
    Defined.
  End Cleaving.

  Definition pb_of_sfib_cleaving
    : internal_sfib_cleaving p₁
    := λ x h₁ h₂ α,
       pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor α
       ,,
       pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell α
       ,,
       pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over α
       ,,
       pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib α
       ,,
       pb_of_sfib_cleaving_commute α.

  Section FromPBCartesian.
    Context {x : B}
            {g₁ g₂ : x --> e₁}
            (α : g₁ ==> g₂)
            (Hα : is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α).

    Let g₀ : x --> e₁
      := pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁).

    Let β : g₀ ==> g₂
      := pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell (α ▹ p₁).

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
g₀:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁): B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell (α ▹ p₁): g₀ ==> g₂
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ β

      apply id2_left.
    Qed.

    Let δ : invertible_2cell g₁ g₀
      := invertible_between_cartesians
           Hα
           Hβ
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over (α ▹ p₁)))
           path_for_invertible_between_cartesians.

  path_for_invertible_between_cartesians: invertible_2cell g₁ g₀

x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
g₀:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁): B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell (α ▹ p₁): g₀ ==> g₂
Hβ:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib
  (α ▹ p₁): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ β
δ:= invertible_between_cartesians Hα Hβ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over (α ▹ p₁)))
  path_for_invertible_between_cartesians: invertible_2cell g₁ g₀
p: δ • β = α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ ((δ • β) ▹ fe)

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
g₀:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁): B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell (α ▹ p₁): g₀ ==> g₂
Hβ:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib
  (α ▹ p₁): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ β
δ:= invertible_between_cartesians Hα Hβ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over (α ▹ p₁)))
  path_for_invertible_between_cartesians: invertible_2cell g₁ g₀
p: δ • β = α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (pb_ump_cell H (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁)) g₂
     (pb_ump_mor_pr1 H
        (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone (α ▹ p₁))
      • internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
          (((((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)
            • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂))
     (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H
        (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cone (α ▹ p₁)) • (α ▹ p₁))
     (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell_subproof (α ▹ p₁)) ▹ fe)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
g₀:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_mor (α ▹ p₁): B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
β:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell (α ▹ p₁): g₀ ==> g₂
Hβ:= pb_of_sfib_cleaving_cell_is_cartesian_2cell_sfib
  (α ▹ p₁): is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ β
δ:= invertible_between_cartesians Hα Hβ
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (pb_of_sfib_cleaving_over (α ▹ p₁)))
  path_for_invertible_between_cartesians: invertible_2cell g₁ g₀
p: δ • β = α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (internal_sfib_cleaving_lift_cell p₂ Hf
     (((((α ▹ p₁) ▹ fb) • rassociator g₂ p₁ fb)
       • (g₂ ◃ γ ^-1)) • lassociator g₂ fe p₂))
 apply internal_sfib_cleaving_is_cartesian.
    Defined.
  End FromPBCartesian.

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
lwhisker_is_cartesian p₁

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
lwhisker_is_cartesian p₁

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x, y: B
h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ (h ◃ α)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x, y: B
h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ ((h ◃ α) ▹ fe)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x, y: B
h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
h · f · fe ==> h · g · fe

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
?α = (h ◃ α) ▹ fe

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x, y: B
h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
h · f · fe ==> h · g · fe
 exact (rassociator _ _ _ • (h ◃ (α ▹ fe)) • lassociator _ _ _).
    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
x, y: B
h: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
(rassociator h f fe • (h ◃ (α ▹ fe)))
• lassociator h g fe = (h ◃ α) ▹ fe
 abstract
        (rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         apply id2_right).

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

f, g: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₁ α
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((rassociator h f fe • (h ◃ (α ▹ fe)))
   • lassociator h g fe)

p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
e₀, b₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₀ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · h₂ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ (p₀ · h₂) δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)

h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · h₂ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ (p₀ · h₂) δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)

  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)

  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
e₀, b₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₀ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧

f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧

H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
H₃: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
   • ((f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
      • (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)))
((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)
• (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
   • (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)) =
rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
• ((f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
   • (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone))

    abstract
      (rewrite vassocr ;
       rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
       rewrite vassocl ;
       rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
       apply idpath).
  Defined.

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb

mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  ((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)

        
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂ (f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)

  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)

  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)

          apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb

x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ

  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)

  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ

          exact Hζ.
    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
H₃: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
   • ((f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
      • (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)))
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)

    
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
x: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, e₀ ⟧
ζ: f ==> g
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₀ ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe)
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
H₃: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
   • ((f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
      • (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone)))
((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)
• (rassociator g (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
   • (g ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)) =
rassociator f (pb_ump_mor H cone) fe
• ((f ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)
   • (ζ ▹ pb_cone_pr1 cone))

    abstract
      (rewrite vassocr ;
       rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
       rewrite vassocl ;
       rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
       apply idpath).
  Defined.
End PullbackOfSFib.


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) (fe · p₂)
  (pb_ump_mor H cone)


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) 
  (fe · p₂) (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
w: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ w, c ⟧
ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (fe · p₂)
  (ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone)

ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr2 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone))

      
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
w: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ w, c ⟧
ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
is_invertible_2cell (pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

Hf: internal_sfib p₂

Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h

Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib fb
  (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone)
     (pb_cone_pr2 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone))
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib fb
  ((rassociator h₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)
      (pb_cone_pr2 pb)
    • (h₁ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone)) • 
   (ζ ▹ h))
((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ p₁)
• (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr2 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone)) =
(rassociator h₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr2 pb)
 • (h₁ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr2 H cone)) • 
(ζ ▹ h)

    abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
       apply idpath).
  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
w: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ w, c ⟧
ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)

cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
w: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ w, c ⟧
ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone))

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sfib p₂

Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h

  (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone)
     (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone))
is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)

Hgmap: mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
w: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ w, c ⟧
ζ: h₁ ==> h₂
Hζ: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib (cp · p₂) ζ
H₁: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone)
     (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone))
H₂: is_cartesian_2cell_sfib p₂
  ((rassociator h₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)
      (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
    • (h₁ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)) • 
   (ζ ▹ cp))
((ζ ▹ pb_ump_mor H cone) ▹ fe)
• (rassociator h₂ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
   • (h₂ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)) =
(rassociator h₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone) (pb_cone_pr1 pb)
 • (h₁ ◃ pb_ump_mor_pr1 H cone)) • 
(ζ ▹ cp)

    abstract
      (cbn ;
       rewrite !vassocr ;
       rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
       rewrite !vassocl ;
       apply maponpaths ;
       rewrite vcomp_whisker ;
       apply idpath).
Defined.

(**
 7. Pullbacks of Street fibrations
 *)

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
internal_sopfib p₁


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
internal_sopfib p₁

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb

Hf: internal_sopfib p₂

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
invertible_2cell (p₁ · fb) (fe · p₂)

    exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ).
  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁
     (let X :=
        λ f g : op2_bicat B ⟦ e₁, b₂ ⟧,
        pr1 (weq_op2_invertible_2cell f g) in
      X (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ)))
 
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ)

    exact H.

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

H: has_pb_ump pb
e₀, b₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₀ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · h₂ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ (p₀ · h₂) δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

H: has_pb_ump pb

h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
e₀, b₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₀ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ b₀, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · h₂ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ (p₀ · h₂) δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  exact (@mor_preserves_cartesian_pb_ump_mor
           (op2_bicat B)
           e₁ e₂ b₁ b₂
           p₁ p₂ fe fb
           _
           (to_op2_has_pb_ump _ H)
           e₀ b₀ p₀
           h₁ h₂
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (weq_op2_invertible_2cell
                 _ _
                 δ))
           (mor_preserves_opcartesian_to_mor_preserves_cartesian
              Hh₁)).
Defined.


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
H: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ)
Hp₂: internal_sopfib p₂
x: B
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib p₁ α
is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib p₂ (α ▹ fe)

α: g₁ ==> g₂
Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib p₁ α

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
H: has_pb_ump (make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ)
Hp₂: internal_sopfib p₂

g₁, g₂: B ⟦ x, e₁ ⟧

    exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ).

e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B

p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧

fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧

Hα: is_opcartesian_2cell_sopfib p₁ α
has_pb_ump
  (make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁
     (let X :=
        λ f g : op2_bicat B ⟦ e₁, b₂ ⟧,
        pr1 (weq_op2_invertible_2cell f g) in
      X (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
        (inv_of_invertible_2cell γ)))

B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
e₀: B
p₀: B ⟦ e₀, b₁ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ e₀, e₂ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (h₁ · p₂) (p₀ · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone e₀ h₁ p₀ δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hh₁: mor_preserves_opcartesian p₀ p₂ h₁
mor_preserves_cartesian p₀ p₁ (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  exact (@mor_preserves_cartesian_pb_ump_mor_alt
           (op2_bicat B)
           e₁ e₂ b₁ b₂
           p₁ p₂ fe fb
           _
           (to_op2_has_pb_ump _ H)
           e₀
           p₀ h₁
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (weq_op2_invertible_2cell
                 _ _
                 δ))
           (mor_preserves_opcartesian_to_mor_preserves_cartesian
              Hh₁)).
Defined.


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) (fe · p₂)
  (pb_ump_mor H cone)


B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
mor_preserves_opcartesian 
  (cp · p₂) (fe · p₂) (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  
B: bicat
e₁, e₂, b₁, b₂: B
p₁: B ⟦ e₁, b₁ ⟧
p₂: B ⟦ e₂, b₂ ⟧
fe: B ⟦ e₁, e₂ ⟧
fb: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
γ: invertible_2cell (fe · p₂) (p₁ · fb)
pb:= make_pb_cone e₁ fe p₁ γ: pb_cone p₂ fb
H: has_pb_ump pb
Hf: internal_sopfib p₂
c: B
cp: B ⟦ c, e₂ ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, b₁ ⟧
δ: invertible_2cell (cp · p₂) (h · fb)
cone:= make_pb_cone c cp h δ: pb_cone p₂ fb
Hfmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) p₂ cp
Hgmap: mor_preserves_opcartesian (cp · p₂) fb h
mor_preserves_cartesian (cp · p₂) 
  (fe · p₂) (pb_ump_mor H cone)

  exact (@mor_preserves_cartesian_pb_ump_mor_comp
           (op2_bicat B)
           e₁ e₂ b₁ b₂
           p₁ p₂ fe fb
           _
           (to_op2_has_pb_ump _ H)
           (internal_sopfib_is_internal_sfib Hf)
           c
           cp h
           (inv_of_invertible_2cell
              (weq_op2_invertible_2cell
                 _ _
                 δ))
           (mor_preserves_opcartesian_to_mor_preserves_cartesian Hfmap)
           (mor_preserves_opcartesian_to_mor_preserves_cartesian Hgmap)).
Defined.
